# required phase-2 storage schema fragments
CREATE TABLE job_submissions
CREATE TABLE sources
CREATE TABLE source_sets
CREATE TABLE source_set_items
CREATE TABLE jobs
CREATE TABLE job_artifacts
CREATE TABLE job_events
CREATE TABLE webhook_deliveries
source_kind = 'youtube_url'
source_kind IN ('uploaded_file', 'telegram_upload')
input_kind IN ('single_source', 'combined_upload', 'combined_telegram')
delivery_strategy = 'webhook'
delivery_strategy = 'polling'
status <> 'cancel_requested'
status IN ('queued', 'running', 'cancel_requested', 'succeeded')
job_event_id uuid NOT NULL UNIQUE REFERENCES job_events(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX jobs_canonical_child_unique_idx
